subject: feat(import): add document-to-form conversion via AI-assisted import
body:
Users with existing questionnaire documents can now convert them into Four Ems
forms using any AI assistant. The workflow: copy format instructions from the app,
give them to an AI alongside the document, paste the AI's JSON output back, and
create a draft form for editing.

New files:
- src/lib/formatInstructions.ts: Self-contained AI prompt with JSON schema, field
  type reference, and example
- src/lib/formImport.ts: Lenient JSON parser with structural validation, auto-ID
  generation, markdown fence stripping, and option value auto-generation
- src/components/builder/ImportFormDialog.tsx: Two-step tabbed dialog (copy
  instructions → paste JSON → validate → create draft)

Modified:
- FormListPage: "Import" button next to "New Form", opens dialog, creates draft
  via API or falls back to router state for demo mode
- BuilderPage: Hydrates from imported definition passed via router state

Tags: import, ai, conversion, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: document-import
Semver: minor

title: add document-to-form conversion via AI-assisted import
